reviews.title: Edit: Good for my 2 year old
reviews.text:
I realize it says it's a kids toothbrush but it's huge! It's bigger than a regular sized brush for adults. I intended this for my 2 year old for Christmas. It's my fault for not looking at details. I've been searching for an Olaf one and this was on sale. I have not tried it but will update when we do...

Update: I gave this to my daughter early because she saw Olaf. It does fit in her mouth and the on/off buttons are easy for her to push. It's her favorite color, purple. She actually brushes her teeth. Well the toothbrush does the work! I don't see a timer on it. So far, the battery is doing fine. My biggest concern is replacing the head. It's already looking like I should replace.

High Quality & Effective Clean – MERUYOO toothbrush replacement heads for Philips Sonicare are made with end-rounded Dupont Nylon Bristles to ensure a thorough and effective clean. The soft, rounded bristles gently clean and polish your teeth and gums, while the advanced design allows for better reach and coverage of hard-to-reach areas.

Gentle Bristles & Gum Health – MERUYOO toothbrush heads for Philips Sonicare with special contoured soft bristles fit the shape of your teeth and gums, can help to effectively remove plaque and promote overall oral health. Soft bristles are beneficial for those with sensitive gums, as they can help to clean teeth and gums gently without causing irritation or discomfort.

Indicator Bristles – MERUYOO electric toothbrush replacement heads for Philips sonicare will fade after 3 months of use when a replacement is needed. Blue soft indicator bristles will fade when it's time to replace.

Individually Wrapped & Travel – Each electric toothbrush replacement heads for Philips Sonic-care is separately packed in a bag and equipped with clear hygienic cover protecting bristles against dust and bacteria for easy storage and travel.

reviews.title: They’re ok…
reviews.text: Of the many compatible replacement heads I’ve tried, this set isn’t my favorite. It doesn’t feel as sturdy as some of the other brands I’ve tried, and rattles a bit. But it does work.

reviews.title: Make my Sonicare ineffective
reviews.text:
The toothbrush heads I received have yellow bristles in place of the advertised green. The color doesn’t matter much to me, but I’m curious if the yellow will work the way the green do and give an indication it’s time to change the brush head? Time will tell.

While I don’t mind the color, I do mind the fact that these brush heads don’t do the same sort of job brushing as do the name brand, or even other non-name brand replacements I’ve used. They fit on my Sonicare brush okay, but when I use it, it doesn’t vibrate nearly as fast or feel like it’s cleaning my teeth the way it should. While using it, I had to fight the urge to start brushing like I would with a manual toothbrush since I didn’t feel like it was doing much of anything to clean my teeth. My Sonicare seems sort of weak and ineffective with this head attached, and it’s not the Sonicare itself, because when I put the old brush head back on, it worked as expected.

reviews.title: Just as good as the name brand!
reviews.text: These replacement toothbrush heads are just as good as the Philips Sonicare ones I've bought in the past. If I closed my eyes I wouldn't know the difference. I'm definitely buying these again, plus they are close to half the price!

reviews.title: Functional And Sturdy
reviews.text: These replacement heads for Sonicare E-Series Toothbrushes arrived individually wrapped.  All of the plastic surfaces are smooth and finished.  The bristles are smooth.  They fit my Sonicare Essence perfectly, and screwed on to the handle easily.  The head of the brush is small, and fits into the back corners of my mouth easily.  They clean my teeth just as well as the name brand replacement heads, for a considerably lower price.  I would definitely recommend them.

reviews.title: Best Sonicare Replacement Heads Yet!
reviews.text: To be fair, this is the second brand I've ever tried, but still, significantly better! Reason one, these are infinitely less expensive than the Up and Up brand replacements, I bought a few years ago. I only received 3 heads for $30, compared to the 6 I received with this brand for $20. Reason two is the fit. The Up and Up brand heads weren't a perfect fit and chattered like crazy whenever I used them, which was less than ideal. These new heads are as silent as the original Sonicare head was out of the box. If you need to switch out your old worn-out head, save yourself some time and money and give these a try.

reviews.title: Best of the Philips brushes
reviews.text:
I've been using Sonicare for 20 years and I find these A3 heads do the best at cleaning my teeth. The C3 are not too far behind, and the C1 are not far behind those. I just use the old rubbing the tongue on my teeth technique, but with the A3, I seem to go longer before I feel like I need a teeth cleaning at the dentist.
I've also used multiple 3rd party heads and none of them even come close to cleaning like the Philips heads. It's just too bad these things are so expensive, I'll probably stick to the C1 heads unless I see the A3 heads go on sale.

reviews.title: My hygienist noticed a difference!
reviews.text: Used to use the C3s. They are smaller and a bit less comfortable to use than this variant. The main winning point is that my hygienist said "what are you doing differently, your mouth looks way better than usual." I take that as an endorsement, and will continue to use these!

reviews.title: It’s a brush head
reviews.text: It’s a brush head

reviews.title: Works great
reviews.text: These are great toothbrush heads and fit my sonicare perfectly. Cleans teeth well. Would recommend.

reviews.title: Overpriced vs C2
reviews.text: I don’t know what a $15 replacement brush head needs to do to earn 5 stars but this just doesn’t blow me away. I typically buy the C2 replacements, I’ve also used C1 and C3. This is comparable to C3 it’s soft and gives a good clean. I can tell a difference between this and C1 or C2 but when I was using even C1 (which feels harder and I don’t like this one as much C2 is my go to) I didn’t have a cavity and my dentist said I was looking good. I do like that this head tells me when to swap out (C1 doesn’t) but $15 for a replacement is steep considering my toothbrush was $30. I will say after my second root canal I made the switch to a Phillips soniccare and since switching to sonic care from a traditional toothbrush I haven’t had any cavities. So I think using the soniccare with whatever heads you can afford is great for your dental health!

reviews.title: Clean Teeth &Gums
reviews.text: These toothbrushes are designed to clean teeth while simultaneous removing plaque from the gum line. The outer bristles angle out. I found the brush to be effective. The bristles are gentle. I have sensitive gums and they were not irritated or sore after use. Good brush.

reviews.title: Very wide
reviews.text: This is a good toothbrush. It is quite unusual. It is very, very wide. Make sure you see how much. I don't think I've ever seen one this wide. How it works for you is just going to depend on whether you like that. You can get a lot more at the same time, but some people may find it uncomfortable, especially if you have a small mouth. But it is a way to be very efficient and get a lot of areas. It feels well made. It seems like a quality brush.

reviews.title: Very wide
reviews.text: This is a good toothbrush. It is quite unusual. It is very, very wide. Make sure you see how much. I don't think I've ever seen one this wide. How it works for you is just going to depend on whether you like that. You can get a lot more at the same time, but some people may find it uncomfortable, especially if you have a small mouth. But it is a way to be very efficient and get a lot of areas. It feels well made. It seems like a quality brush.

reviews.title: Nothing fancy but does the job.
reviews.text: Toothbrushes are necessary and seem to be the one thing that I forget to purchase when I go to the store. So, ordering these Ooak toothbrushes was a no-brainer. These are not fancy. They are traditional toothbrushes that leave your teeth feeling smooth and clean (grit free). There are five rows of soft bristles…the three rows in the center are straight and the outside (colored) ones are slightly angled. The colors of the brushes are neutral, white and orange. The rubber grip handle makes it easy to grip and hold. And finally, on Amazon this two pack is under $7, which is reasonable when compared to other two packs on the market. I’d recommend these.

reviews.title: A unique set of toothbrushes
reviews.text: This toothbrush set has been designed in a V design for the bristles - which means that it looks different than other toothbrushes. The bristles have a lot of space to get in the gum line, in between teeth and works well. I got the medium bristles which are fine with me. I don't want too hard of a bristle, as that is not recommended by the dentist. This does a decent job cleaning.

title: Initio Sonic Electric Toothbrush for Adults, 5 Modes with Smart Timer, 8 Brush Heads & Travel Case Included, Rechargeable Toothbrush, Oral Care Whitening Toothbrush, IT959
description: Initio Electric Toothbrush for adults adopts advanced technology by providing 40,000 high-speed vibrations per minute and effectively removing all teeth stains! The rechargeable electric toothbrush's built-in timer automatically shuts off in 2 minutes and pauses every 30 seconds to allow for ample brushing time and habits. 5 High-Performance-Brushing modes are available to meet different oral needs. Brush in the shower as this unit is waterproof up to IPX7 standard. Initio Electric Toothbrush for adults provides 8 famous DuPont brush heads for over 2 years of using. Each brush head comes with a protective cover to keep it clean and hygienic! Lastly, we provide you with a one-year warranty against any defects or issues you may have with the electric toothbrush. reviews.title: Adorable toothbrush and great teether as well but pricey
reviews.text:
This toothbrush/teether is BPA free and made of soft silicone. The head of the cute bear prevents the toothbrush piece from going too far into the baby's mouth but it is still long enough to act as a teether and also massage the gums. Babies usually do not start getting teeth until about 6 months so it can help the child get used to the first steps of "brushing their teeth." The current price of $12.99 ($15.99 minus $3) is a bit pricey for this.

Always supervise during use and be careful to clean this regularly. Because the brush area is grooved, it is important to give this a vigorous cleaning in that area as food, lint, etc. can get caught in that area depending on where the baby puts it.

reviews.title: Convenient, choke-proof baby toothbrush and teether
reviews.text: The whole thing is designed so that baby can't choke on it no matter which part she puts in her mouth.  The whole 'handle' is bendy silicone, which she also likes as a teether.  The wide bear head makes it easy for her to grab and hold onto it.  The brush is on all sides that you don't have to keep turning it around to get both upper and lower teeth, and still goes in enough to brush her tongue and gums.  It's all about the convenience.

reviews.title: Baby toothbrush
reviews.text: Baby now has two adorable teeth and we just started using this toothbrush before bed every night. Not sure how this is supposed to work because we don’t use toothpaste but he laughs and laughs so we love using it. It’s such a cute part of his bedtime routine and as he gets older he will hopefully have a great association with brushing his teeth and dental hygiene because of this

reviews.title: Great value for the money sonic toothbrush
reviews.text:
Great adult sonic toothbrush for a nice value. One thing to note is this vibrates rather than spins. I am sure it helps clean better than a manual one, but I would prefer a spinning head for myself. Regardless, I enjoy using it. It comes with 6 replacement heads for a 18 month supply, which is pretty impressive. Has a 2 minute timer as well as 5 cleaning modes. 60+ day charge. Nice black color. Easy to use & charge. Great value for the money.

Amazon will donate to your favorite charity! Use Amazon Smile (smile.amazon.com) when you order and Amazon will donate to the charity of your choice when you make a qualifying purchase. reviews.title: Attractive yellow color!
reviews.text: First of all, I love this bright yellow colored electric toothbrush! A refreshing change from the regular black and  white sonic electric toothbrushes that are on the market right now! The bristles are ordinary but the extra brush heads make up for it. The price is just the same like the regular sonic brushes right now so it is worth a try!

reviews.title: Strong Vibration
reviews.text: Works well with strong vibration. Timer works well with 30 seconds intervals. Brushes well with soft bristles. The only thing that I personally don't like is the slippery handle. Otherwise it is a good product. Shipping was fast.

reviews.title: The Yellow is Very Cheerful
reviews.text: This is a nice electric toothbrush for the price. It has multiple settings (clean, soft, polish, massage, and white), although I tend to leave it on white most of the time. The sunny yellow color is really quite cheerful and is a bright start to the day. The bristles are softer than others I've used, which is nice for those of us who tend to brush too hard. I really like that the brush head (and even the bristles) match the body... all in the same sunny yellow. I'm also impressed that it came with so many replacement brush heads, each with their own cover. I won't need to buy replacements for a long time! I'm pretty impressed overall.

reviews.title: Really Like It!
reviews.text: This toothbrush is sleek and powerful and I really like all of the different settings. It has a good battery life - I have only had to charge it twice so far.

title: DentistRx Intelisonic Brush Heads Refill, 2 ea - 2pc
description: This DentistRx Intelisonic Brush Head Refill includes 4 brush heads. The heads have a Tri-Peak bristle head that conforms to the contour of the tooth for more effective deep cleaning. The heads are designed for use with the DentistRx Intelisonic Sonic Toothbrush. Contains 4 brush heads.
features: DentistRx Intelisonic Brush Head Refill
Designed for use with the Intelisonic Sonic Toothbrush
Tri-Peak bristle design for effective cleaning
Conforms to the contour of teeth for deep cleaning
Includes 4 brush heads
